title: Zero
description: After 6 years later, he is now wearing glasses.

title: Zero
description: You're beautiful as the day i've lost you.

title: 2B & 9S Chibi
description: Breaking free from YoRHA, they uncover the truth about their existence, and start to express their true emotions.

title: 2B & 9S Blindfolded Chibi
description: 2B is a Battler-Type Android, while 9S is a Scanner-Type Android serving the YoRHA Elite Military Force.

title: Lyza
description: Lyza is an infamous cybercriminal known online. Truth is, everything she does is for the sake of humanity, even when the whole world is against it. She is a very independant and a weird individual, who loves the tingling sensation of the low and high audio frequencies, that even outperforms a Navy Sound Operator. She is even good at video games, where her username managed to be known by many, on top of global leaderboard. Her current whereabouts is unknown.

title: Lyza Y2k
description: Lyza Y2K fit with my friends' artstyle C:

title: Hikaue Chibi
description: A chibi of my Roblox OC!

title: Hikaue Headshot
description: My first ever commissioned art, from my Roblox OC, for FREE ToT. I met the artist on a Roblox Art Server called FreeDraw, because back then I used to draw digitally on that game. Oh how time flies...
